title: NEA names Washington’s Stanley Calhoun 2026 Education Support Professional of the Year
summary_en: “NEA has chosen to honor Ric because of his extraordinary commitment to and compassionate care for his students,” said NEA President Becky Pringle.
title_cn: 美国全国教育协会授予华盛顿州人士斯坦利·卡尔霍恩2026年度教育支持专业人员称号
